title: Southern Style Callaloo Wrap
description: A twist on a classic Southern dish, using callaloo as the main ingredient wrapped in a warm tortilla.

ingredients.name: 1 pot
ingredients.notes: Use a large pot for this recipe

instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil.
Add the chopped callaloo to the pot and cook until tender.
Heat the Southern-style wrap in a pan or oven until warm and pliable.
Place the cooked callaloo onto the wrap, leaving a small border around the edges.
Sprinkle the intense cheese and yeasty yeast flakes over the callaloo.
Add chopped Thai basil on top for extra flavor.
Fold the bottom edge of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap into a neat package.
